reasoning: Initial observation suggests the resistors are in series since the total resistance is the sum of individual resistances. To confirm, I will increase R1 and observe if the total resistance changes.
Increasing R1 did not change the total resistance, which suggests the resistors are in parallel rather than series. I will now decrease R1 to further confirm this.
The total resistance did not change when R1 was decreased, confirming the resistors are in parallel. The formula for total resistance in a parallel circuit is 1/total_resistance = 1/R1 + 1/R2.
